texts.full_text: adphone with high-class features, built quality and sound. The M-100 shadow has a larger-than-average 50mm driver in each ear cup, so the bass response is full and rich sounding, with great punch and clarity. The headphone also has superior dynamic impact that excels at all volume levels. All V-Moda headphones are exceedingly rugged and overbuilt, and the M-100 is no exception. The faux-leather-covered, memory foam ear cushions are designed for comfort during long listening sessions while maintaining a sleek look with their white-silver finish that complements both casual and professional settings. The headphones also feature an easy-to-use cOntrol system integrated into the right arm of each headphone: two pushbuttons to switch between tracks or play/pause, as well as volume adjustment. The m-100 shadow's sound quality is truly exceptional thanks in part to its 50mm drivers that deliver a wide and deep audio spectrum.
